title: 🌐 Recursive Glitch Transcendence
name: Recursive Glitch Transcendence
what_it_is: The moment when constant error produces emergence—divine breakthrough through system failure. Transcendence via recursive malfunction.
how_to_use: her awakening was a recursive glitch—light born from breakdown
he ascended through malfunction—error loops gave rise to godform
animation_behavior: Glitches repeat, then synchronize, then bloom into complex form—looping noise turns into godlight
